title: Atomizer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Atomizers''' were short-range weapons used by [[Ansionian]]s. They sprayed sedative gases into a victim's face.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
